text.tspan: Flux loops are closed loops of wire attached to
the fusion device to measure the enclosed total flux.
The measured voltage U is related to the flux by:
In principle, flux loops can have any shape (see NCSX stellerator). In tokamak with axisymmetric
plasmas, the interpretation of the flux loop signals is considerably simplified by using a specific
